name: Old El Paso Layered Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Old El Paso Refried Beans
1 package Old El Paso Taco Seasoning
1 can Old El Paso Thick 'n' Chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the refried beans, ground beef, taco seasoning, water, shredded lettuce, and thick 'n' chunky.
3. Stir in the salsa or picante until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into an oven-safe dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Turn off the heat and let the dip cool for a few minutes before serving.
